reason: 5 implemented modules are undocumented: tunnel, CLI, HTTPS/middleware, VAD, embed. Architecture match is 88% but these gaps prevent reaching compliance.
proposedChange: Add sections for: tunnel (src/tunnel.js - LAN tunnel), CLI (src/cli/ - setup.js, browser.js), HTTPS/middleware (src/server/cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), VAD (src/runtime/vad.js), embed runtime (src/runtime/embed.js and adapters/).
